name: IdsAcaPgmPaymtRowCntBal

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT SRC.ACTVTY_YR_MO as SRC_ACTVTY_YR_MO, SRC.PAYMT_COV_YR_MO as SRC_PAYMT_COV_YR_MO, SRC.PAYMT_TYP_CD AS SRC_PAYMT_TYP_CD, SRC.ST_CD AS SRC_ST_CD, SRC.QHP_ID AS SRC_QHP_ID, SRC.ACA_PGM_PAYMT_SEQ_NO AS SRC_ACA_PGM_PAYMT_SEQ_NO, SRC.SRC_SYS_CD_SK as SRC_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, TRGT.ACTVTY_YR_MO as TRGT_ACTVTY_YR_MO, TRGT.PAYMT_COV_YR_MO as TRGT_PAYMT_COV_YR_MO, TRGT.PAYMT_TYP_CD AS TRGT_PAYMT_TYP_CD, TRGT.ST_CD AS TRGT_ST_CD, TRGT.QHP_ID AS TRGT_QHP_ID, TRGT.ACA_PGM_PAYMT_SEQ_NO AS TRGT_ACA_PGM_PAYMT_SEQ_NO, TRGT.SRC_SYS_CD_SK as TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.B_ACA_PGM_PAYMT AS SRC FULL OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.ACA_PGM_PAYMT AS TRGT ON SRC.ACTVTY_YR_MO = TRGT.ACTVTY_YR_MO AND SRC.PAYMT_COV_YR_MO = TRGT.PAYMT_COV_YR_MO AND SRC.PAYMT_TYP_CD = TRGT.PAYMT_TYP_CD AND SRC.ST_CD = TRGT.ST_CD AND SRC.QHP_ID = TRGT.QHP_ID AND SRC.ACA_PGM_PAYMT_SEQ_NO = TRGT.ACA_PGM_PAYMT_SEQ_NO AND TRGT.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = SRC.SRC_SYS_CD_SK WHERE TRGT.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle}) SELECT * FROM cte

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A938_TMP_RESEARCH_IdsAcaPgmPaymtRowCntBal; SELECT * INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A938_TMP_RESEARCH_IdsAcaPgmPaymtRowCntBal FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A938_TMP_IdsAcaPgmPaymtRowCntBal WHERE (SRC_ACTVTY_YR_MO IS NULL OR SRC_PAYMT_COV_YR_MO IS NULL OR SRC_PAYMT_TYP_CD IS NULL OR SRC_ST_CD IS NULL OR SRC_QHP_ID IS NULL OR SRC_ACA_PGM_PAYMT_SEQ_NO IS NULL OR SRC_SRC_SYS_CD_SK IS NULL OR TRGT_ACTVTY_YR_MO IS NULL OR TRGT_PAYMT_COV_YR_MO IS NULL OR TRGT_PAYMT_TYP_CD IS NULL OR TRGT_ST_CD IS NULL OR TRGT_QHP_ID IS NULL OR TRGT_ACA_PGM_PAYMT_SEQ_NO IS NULL OR TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK IS NULL); DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A938_TMP_NOTIFY_IdsAcaPgmPaymtRowCntBal; SELECT TOP 1 'ROW COUNT BALANCING FACETS - IDS ACA_PGM_PAYMT IS OUT OF TOLERANCE' AS NOTIFICATION INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A938_TMP_NOTIFY_IdsAcaPgmPaymtRowCntBal FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.A938_TMP_IdsAcaPgmPaymtRowCntBal WHERE '@{pipeline().parameters.ToleranceCd}'='OUT';

Description:
PROCESSING:  This job runs Balancing Full Outer Join SQL on ACA_PGM_PAYMT and B_ACA_PGM_PAYMT tables to find out if there are any fallouts.
